name: Skyline Furniture 25" Velvet Parsons Counter Height Barstool Wood
description: Bring modern appeal to your home bar area with this Velvet Parsons Counter-Height Barstool from Skyline Furniture. This armless counter-height bar stool features a well-padded seat and backrest along with built-in footrest bars for additional sitting comfort. The plush solid-color velvet upholstery goes easily with a range of decor styles, while the wood frame and legs offer a classic, elegant base.
